one_time_description: Flood claim settlement proceeds of $204,000,000 and other settlement proceeds of $1,763,032 recorded as other items outside normal operations
economic_notes: Obishikokaang Resources Corporation manages forestry operations. Waaninaawagaang Developments LP and 2361701 Ontario Inc. are former Tim Hortons franchise operations. Lac Seul Ear Falls GP Ltd. owns 0.01% of Lac Seul Generating Station Limited Partnership. Economic Development segment manages various business projects.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED for two reasons: (1) deferred revenue of $22,469,236 that should be recognized in surplus per PSAS; (2) asset retirement obligation for landfill not recorded due to insufficient audit evidence. Massive one-time flood claim settlement of $204,000,000 received in 2024 (recorded as Other Items outside normal operations), plus $1,763,032 in other settlement proceeds. The $4,000,000 Lac Seul First Nations Bare Trust expense relates to the flood claim settlement. Entity has complex consolidation with 15+ subsidiaries. Restricted cash includes Ottawa Trust Funds ($192,387) and restricted cash/GICs ($8,202,976). Net financial assets jumped from $27.4M to $229.1M primarily due to flood claim settlement. Auditor identified as 'Chartered Professional Accountants Inc.' based in Winnipeg, Manitoba - specific firm name unclear from document.
